---
title: "SCZ/BIP Fine-mapping — Master Results"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    self_contained: true
---

<script>
function showLocus(analysis, val) {
  var divs = document.getElementsByClassName('locus-' + analysis);
  for (var i = 0; i < divs.length; i++) divs[i].style.display = 'none';
  if (val !== '') {
    var el = document.getElementById(analysis + '-' + val);
    if (el) el.style.display = 'block';
  }
}
</script>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
library(biomaRt)
library(kableExtra)
library(scales)
```

```{r config, include=FALSE}
BASE <- "C:/Users/c1977426/OneDrive - Cardiff University/Documents/PGC4"

analyses <- list(
  sczvsbp = list(
    label    = "SCZ vs BIP",
    dir      = file.path(BASE, "r_files/sczvsbp"),
    ld_dir   = file.path(BASE, "ld/sczvsbp"),
    sumstats = file.path(BASE, "sumstats/daner_scz_vs_bip_1025_noduppos_hetpva.gz")
  ),
  sczvsbp1 = list(
    label    = "SCZ vs BIP1",
    dir      = file.path(BASE, "r_files/sczvsbp1"),
    ld_dir   = file.path(BASE, "ld/sczvsbp1"),
    sumstats = file.path(BASE, "sumstats/daner_scz_vs_bip1_1025_noduppos_hetpva.gz")
  ),
  sczandbp = list(
    label    = "SCZ + BIP vs Controls",
    dir      = file.path(BASE, "r_files/sczandbp"),
    ld_dir   = file.path(BASE, "ld/sczandbp"),
    sumstats = file.path(BASE, "sumstats/daner_scz_bip_vs_allcontrols_1025_noduppos_hetpva.gz")
  )
)

L_USE        <- 5
GENE_CACHE_F <- file.path(BASE, "r_files/gene_cache_v2.rds")  # v2 includes lncRNA
PLOT_DIR     <- file.path(BASE, "results/plots")
dir.create(PLOT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
ld_pal       <- colorRampPalette(c("#313695","#74add1","#e0f3f8","#ffffbf",
                                    "#fee090","#f46d43","#a50026"))(256)
```

```{r helpers, include=FALSE}
# ── Stagger overlapping gene labels onto separate y-levels ──────────────────
assign_y_levels <- function(genes, max_levels = 5,
                            min_center_distance = NULL, min_end_distance = 20000) {
  genes <- genes[order(genes$start), ]
  n     <- nrow(genes)
  span  <- max(genes$end) - min(genes$start)
  if (is.null(min_center_distance)) min_center_distance <- max(20000, span / 15)
  lvls  <- vector("list", max_levels)
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    placed <- FALSE
    for (j in seq_len(max_levels)) {
      if (length(lvls[[j]]) == 0) {
        lvls[[j]] <- c(lvls[[j]], i); placed <- TRUE; break
      } else {
        last <- lvls[[j]][length(lvls[[j]])]
        cd <- ((genes$start[i] + genes$end[i]) - (genes$start[last] + genes$end[last])) / 2
        ed <- genes$start[i] - genes$end[last]
        if (cd >= min_center_distance && ed >= min_end_distance) {
          lvls[[j]] <- c(lvls[[j]], i); placed <- TRUE; break
        }
      }
    }
    if (!placed) { max_levels <- max_levels + 1; lvls[[max_levels]] <- i }
  }
  y <- rep(0L, n)
  for (k in seq_along(lvls)) y[lvls[[k]]] <- k
  genes$y_level <- y
  genes
}

# ── Assign gene name by BP position using biomaRt gene cache ────────────────
# Returns gene name(s) if SNP BP falls within a gene boundary, else NA
gene_by_position <- function(snp_ids, chr_val, ss, chr_genes) {
  if (is.null(chr_genes) || nrow(chr_genes) == 0) return(rep(NA_character_, length(snp_ids)))
  bp_vec <- ss$BP[match(snp_ids, ss$SNP)]
  sapply(bp_vec, function(bp) {
    if (is.na(bp)) return(NA_character_)
    hits <- chr_genes[chr_genes$start_position <= bp & chr_genes$end_position >= bp, ]
    if (nrow(hits) == 0) return(NA_character_)
    nms <- hits$external_gene_name[!is.na(hits$external_gene_name) & hits$external_gene_name != ""]
    if (length(nms) == 0) return(NA_character_)
    paste(unique(nms), collapse = "; ")
  })
}

# ── Save a ggplot/patchwork to file and return an <img> tag ─────────────────
# Use absolute path in src so pandoc --embed-resources can find and inline it
embed_gg <- function(p, fname, width = 9.5, height = 5.5) {
  path <- file.path(PLOT_DIR, fname)
  ggplot2::ggsave(path, plot = p, width = width, height = height, dpi = 90)
  sprintf('<img src="%s" style="width:100%%;max-width:960px;display:block;margin:8px auto;"/>\n',
          gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(path, mustWork = FALSE)))
}

# ── Save a base-R plot to file and return an <img> tag ──────────────────────
embed_base <- function(draw_fn, fname, width = 9.5, height = 7) {
  path <- file.path(PLOT_DIR, fname)
  png(path, width = round(width * 90), height = round(height * 90), res = 90)
  tryCatch(draw_fn(), finally = dev.off())
  sprintf('<img src="%s" style="width:100%%;max-width:960px;display:block;margin:8px auto;"/>\n',
          gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(path, mustWork = FALSE)))
}

# ── Check whether ALL CS SNPs lie wholly within one gene ────────────────────
check_prioritised_gene <- function(cs_bp, chr_genes) {
  if (is.null(chr_genes) || nrow(chr_genes) == 0) return(NULL)
  pos <- cs_bp[!is.na(cs_bp)]
  if (length(pos) == 0) return(NULL)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(chr_genes))) {
    gname <- chr_genes$external_gene_name[i]
    if (is.na(gname) || gname == "") gname <- chr_genes$ensembl_gene_id[i]
    if (all(pos >= chr_genes$start_position[i] & pos <= chr_genes$end_position[i]))
      return(gname)
  }
  NULL
}

# ── Build the gene track portion shared by both plot types ──────────────────
make_gene_track <- function(chr_genes, bp_start, bp_stop, cs_pos_pip, chr_val) {
  if (is.null(chr_genes) || nrow(chr_genes) == 0) return(list(plot = NULL, max_y = 1))
  genes <- chr_genes %>%
    filter(start_position <= bp_stop & end_position >= bp_start) %>%
    mutate(gene_label   = ifelse(!is.na(external_gene_name) & external_gene_name != "",
                                  external_gene_name, ensembl_gene_id),
           gene_support = 0)
  if (nrow(genes) == 0) return(list(plot = NULL, max_y = 1))

  # Accumulate CS PIP support per gene
  if (!is.null(cs_pos_pip) && nrow(cs_pos_pip) > 0) {
    for (k in seq_len(nrow(cs_pos_pip))) {
      hit <- which(genes$start_position <= cs_pos_pip$BP[k] & genes$end_position >= cs_pos_pip$BP[k])
      genes$gene_support[hit] <- genes$gene_support[hit] + cs_pos_pip$PIP[k]
    }
    genes$gene_support <- pmin(genes$gene_support, 1)
  }

  # Clip gene extents to the plot window for display
  genes <- genes %>%
    mutate(start_d = pmax(start_position, bp_start),
           end_d   = pmin(end_position,   bp_stop))

  # Assign non-overlapping y-levels
  gd_y  <- genes %>% transmute(gene_id = ensembl_gene_id, start = start_d, end = end_d)
  gd_y  <- assign_y_levels(gd_y)
  genes <- left_join(genes, gd_y,
                     by = c("ensembl_gene_id" = "gene_id", "start_d" = "start", "end_d" = "end"))
  max_y <- max(genes$y_level, na.rm = TRUE)

  gp <- ggplot(genes, aes(x = start_d, y = y_level)) +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = end_d, yend = y_level, color = gene_support), linewidth = 4) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "#8B73B5", high = "#E66100", limits = c(0, 1), na.value = "#8B73B5",
                         name = "Cumul.\nPIP") +
    geom_text_repel(aes(x = (start_d + end_d) / 2, label = gene_label),
                    size = 2.8, nudge_y = 0.45, direction = "x",
                    segment.color = NA, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(bp_start, bp_stop), labels = scales::comma) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.3, max_y + 1)) +
    labs(x = sprintf("Chr%d position (GRCh38)", chr_val)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank())
  list(plot = gp, max_y = max_y)
}

# ── SuSiE locus zoom (CS SNPs: PIP gradient; non-CS: grey) ──────────────────
make_susie_plot <- function(locus_num, ld) {
  locus  <- sprintf("%03d", locus_num)
  fit    <- ld$fits[[locus]]
  loci   <- ld$loci_input
  li     <- loci[loci_id == locus_num]
  chr_val  <- li$chr
  bp_start <- li$start
  bp_stop  <- li$end

  if (is.null(fit) || is.null(fit$snp_ids)) return(NULL)

  # Extend window to all SuSiE SNPs present in sumstats
  snp_pos <- ld$sumstats[SNP %in% fit$snp_ids & CHR == chr_val, BP]
  if (length(snp_pos) > 0) {
    bp_start <- min(bp_start, min(snp_pos))
    bp_stop  <- max(bp_stop,  max(snp_pos))
  }

  ss <- ld$sumstats[CHR == chr_val & BP >= bp_start & BP <= bp_stop]
  if (nrow(ss) == 0) return(NULL)

  # PIP lookup
  pip_map          <- setNames(rep(0, nrow(ss)), ss$SNP)
  shared           <- intersect(ss$SNP, fit$snp_ids)
  pip_map[shared]  <- fit$pip[match(shared, fit$snp_ids)]
  ss[, PIP   := pip_map[SNP]]
  ss[, log10p := -log10(P)]

  all_cs_snps <- if (!is.null(fit$sets$cs) && length(fit$sets$cs) > 0)
    unlist(lapply(fit$sets$cs, function(idx) fit$snp_ids[idx])) else character(0)
  ss[, in_cs := SNP %in% all_cs_snps]

  sp <- ggplot(ss, aes(x = BP, y = log10p)) +
    geom_point(data = ss[!(in_cs)], aes(size = PIP), color = "#BBBBBB", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(data = ss[(in_cs)],  aes(color = PIP, size = PIP, alpha = PIP)) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "#5D3A9B", high = "#E66100", limits = c(0, 1), name = "PIP") +
    scale_size_continuous(range  = c(0.5, 5), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.4, 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(bp_start, bp_stop), labels = scales::comma) +
    labs(y     = expression(-log[10](italic(p))),
         title = sprintf("SuSiE L=5 — Locus %d  Chr%d: %s–%s",
                         locus_num, chr_val,
                         formatC(bp_start, format = "d", big.mark = ","),
                         formatC(bp_stop,  format = "d", big.mark = ","))) +
    guides(size = "none", alpha = "none") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

  cs_pos_pip <- if (length(all_cs_snps) > 0)
    ss[(in_cs), .(BP, PIP)] else NULL
  gt <- make_gene_track(ld$gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]], bp_start, bp_stop, cs_pos_pip, chr_val)

  if (!is.null(gt$plot))
    sp + gt$plot + plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(3, max(1.5, gt$max_y * 0.65)))
  else sp
}

# ── FINEMAP locus zoom ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_fm_plot <- function(locus_num, ld) {
  locus  <- sprintf("%03d", locus_num)
  loci   <- ld$loci_input
  li     <- loci[loci_id == locus_num]
  chr_val  <- li$chr
  bp_start <- li$start
  bp_stop  <- li$end
  fmdir    <- file.path(ld$finemap_dir, locus)

  snp_file <- file.path(fmdir, paste0(locus, ".snp"))
  if (!file.exists(snp_file)) return(NULL)
  fm_snps <- fread(snp_file)

  # Best cred file (highest posterior Pr(k))
  cred_files  <- sort(list.files(fmdir, pattern = paste0("^", locus, "\\.cred[0-9]+$"), full.names = TRUE))
  best_cred   <- NULL; best_pr <- -1
  for (cf in cred_files) {
    hdr <- readLines(cf, n = 2)
    pr  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(regmatches(hdr[1], regexpr("[0-9.eE+\\-]+$", hdr[1]))))
    if (!is.na(pr) && pr > best_pr) { best_pr <- pr; best_cred <- cf }
  }
  all_cs_snps <- character(0)
  if (!is.null(best_cred)) {
    clines <- readLines(best_cred)
    skip   <- grep("^index", clines) - 1
    if (length(skip) > 0) {
      cdat <- tryCatch(fread(best_cred, skip = skip[1]), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(cdat)) {
        for (col in grep("^cred[0-9]+$", names(cdat), value = TRUE)) {
          snps <- cdat[[col]][!is.na(cdat[[col]])]
          all_cs_snps <- union(all_cs_snps, snps)
        }
      }
    }
  }

  snp_pos <- ld$sumstats[SNP %in% fm_snps$rsid & CHR == chr_val, BP]
  if (length(snp_pos) > 0) {
    bp_start <- min(bp_start, min(snp_pos))
    bp_stop  <- max(bp_stop,  max(snp_pos))
  }

  ss <- ld$sumstats[CHR == chr_val & BP >= bp_start & BP <= bp_stop]
  if (nrow(ss) == 0) return(NULL)

  pip_map         <- setNames(rep(0, nrow(ss)), ss$SNP)
  shared          <- intersect(ss$SNP, fm_snps$rsid)
  pip_map[shared] <- fm_snps$prob[match(shared, fm_snps$rsid)]
  ss[, PIP    := pip_map[SNP]]
  ss[, log10p := -log10(P)]
  ss[, in_cs  := SNP %in% all_cs_snps]

  sp <- ggplot(ss, aes(x = BP, y = log10p)) +
    geom_point(data = ss[!(in_cs)], aes(size = PIP), color = "#BBBBBB", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(data = ss[(in_cs)],  aes(color = PIP, size = PIP, alpha = PIP)) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "#5D3A9B", high = "#E66100", limits = c(0, 1), name = "PIP") +
    scale_size_continuous(range  = c(0.5, 5), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.4, 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(bp_start, bp_stop), labels = scales::comma) +
    labs(y     = expression(-log[10](italic(p))),
         title = sprintf("FINEMAP k=5 — Locus %d  Chr%d: %s–%s",
                         locus_num, chr_val,
                         formatC(bp_start, format = "d", big.mark = ","),
                         formatC(bp_stop,  format = "d", big.mark = ","))) +
    guides(size = "none", alpha = "none") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

  cs_pos_pip <- if (length(all_cs_snps) > 0) ss[(in_cs), .(BP, PIP)] else NULL
  gt <- make_gene_track(ld$gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]], bp_start, bp_stop, cs_pos_pip, chr_val)

  if (!is.null(gt$plot))
    sp + gt$plot + plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(3, max(1.5, gt$max_y * 0.65)))
  else sp
}

# ── LD heatmap (base R) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ld_heatmap_fn <- function(LD, locus_num) {
  n <- nrow(LD)
  function() {
    old <- par(no.readonly = TRUE); on.exit(par(old))
    layout(matrix(c(1L, 2L), 1, 2), widths = c(8, 1))
    par(mar = c(2, 2, 3, 0.5), pty = "s")
    image(seq_len(n), seq_len(n), LD, col = ld_pal, zlim = c(-1, 1),
          axes = FALSE, useRaster = TRUE,
          main = sprintf("LD r — locus %d  (%d × %d SNPs)", locus_num, n, n))
    par(mar = c(2, 0.5, 3, 2.5), pty = "m")
    image(1L, seq(-1, 1, length.out = 256),
          matrix(seq(-1, 1, length.out = 256), nrow = 1L),
          col = ld_pal, zlim = c(-1, 1), xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n")
    axis(4, at = c(-1, 0, 1), labels = c("-1", "0", "1"), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.85)
    mtext("r", side = 4, line = 2, cex = 0.85)
    layout(1)
  }
}
```

```{r load-data, include=FALSE}
all_data <- list()

for (aname in names(analyses)) {
  a <- analyses[[aname]]
  message("Loading: ", aname)

  ss <- fread(a$sumstats)
  ss <- ss[HetPVa > 0.05]
  ss[, zscore := log(OR) / SE]

  loci <- fread(file.path(a$dir, "loci_input.txt"), header = FALSE,
                select = 1:4, col.names = c("loci_id", "chr", "start", "end"))

  fits <- list()
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(loci))) {
    locus <- sprintf("%03d", loci$loci_id[i])
    rds   <- file.path(a$dir, "susie", sprintf("%s.susie_l%d.rds", locus, L_USE))
    if (file.exists(rds)) fits[[locus]] <- readRDS(rds)
  }

  ld_matrices <- list()
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(loci))) {
    locus   <- sprintf("%03d", loci$loci_id[i])
    ld_f    <- file.path(a$ld_dir, paste0(locus, ".ld.gz"))
    snp_log <- file.path(a$ld_dir, paste0(locus, ".snp.log"))
    if (!file.exists(ld_f)) next
    LD <- as.matrix(fread(ld_f, header = FALSE))
    if (file.exists(snp_log)) {
      snps <- readLines(snp_log)
      if (length(snps) == nrow(LD)) dimnames(LD) <- list(snps, snps)
    }
    diag(LD) <- 1.0
    ld_matrices[[locus]] <- LD
  }

  # VEP: pick most severe consequence per SNP
  vep_f   <- file.path(a$dir, "vep_annotation.txt")
  vep_map <- setNames(character(0), character(0))
  if (file.exists(vep_f)) {
    vep_raw <- fread(vep_f)
    colnames(vep_raw)[1] <- "SNP"
    impact_rank <- c("HIGH" = 1L, "MODERATE" = 2L, "LOW" = 3L, "MODIFIER" = 4L, "-" = 5L)
    vep_raw[, rank := impact_rank[IMPACT]]
    vep_raw[is.na(rank), rank := 5L]
    vep_best <- vep_raw[order(SNP, rank)][!duplicated(SNP)]
    gene_col        <- if ("SYMBOL" %in% names(vep_best)) vep_best$SYMBOL else rep("-", nrow(vep_best))
    vep_consequence <- setNames(vep_best$Consequence, vep_best$SNP)
    vep_gene        <- setNames(gene_col,              vep_best$SNP)
  }

  all_data[[aname]] <- list(
    label       = a$label,
    sumstats    = ss,
    loci_input  = loci,
    fits        = fits,
    ld_matrices = ld_matrices,
    vep_consequence = vep_consequence,
    vep_gene        = vep_gene,
    finemap_dir = file.path(a$dir, "finemap"),
    gene_cache  = NULL
  )
}
```

```{r gene-fetch, include=FALSE}
gene_cache <- if (file.exists(GENE_CACHE_F)) readRDS(GENE_CACHE_F) else list()

grch38 <- NULL
for (mir in c("useast", "uswest", "asia", "www")) {
  grch38 <- tryCatch(
    useEnsembl("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl", mirror = mir),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (!is.null(grch38)) { message("biomaRt connected: ", mir); break }
}
if (is.null(grch38)) warning("All Ensembl mirrors failed — gene tracks disabled")

all_chrs <- unique(unlist(lapply(all_data, function(d) d$loci_input$chr)))

if (!is.null(grch38)) {
  for (chr in all_chrs) {
    key <- paste0("chr", chr)
    if (key %in% names(gene_cache)) next
    genes <- tryCatch(
      getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name",
                           "start_position", "end_position"),
            filters   = c("chromosome_name", "biotype"),
            values    = list(as.character(chr), c("protein_coding", "lncRNA")),
            mart      = grch38),
      error = function(e) { message("Gene fetch chr", chr, ": ", conditionMessage(e)); NULL }
    )
    if (!is.null(genes)) gene_cache[[key]] <- genes
  }
  saveRDS(gene_cache, GENE_CACHE_F)
}

for (aname in names(all_data)) all_data[[aname]]$gene_cache <- gene_cache
```

```{r render-fn, include=FALSE}
render_analysis <- function(aname) {
  ld   <- all_data[[aname]]
  loci <- ld$loci_input

  # Pre-compute prioritised gene status for SuSiE and FINEMAP separately
  pg_status <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(loci)), function(i) {
    lkey      <- sprintf("%03d", loci$loci_id[i])
    chr_genes <- ld$gene_cache[[paste0("chr", loci$chr[i])]]
    chr_val_i <- loci$chr[i]

    # SuSiE
    susie_pg <- FALSE
    fit <- ld$fits[[lkey]]
    if (!is.null(fit) && !is.null(fit$sets$cs) && length(fit$sets$cs) > 0 && !is.null(chr_genes)) {
      for (cs_i in seq_along(fit$sets$cs)) {
        cs_bp <- ld$sumstats[SNP %in% fit$snp_ids[fit$sets$cs[[cs_i]]] & CHR == chr_val_i, BP]
        if (!is.null(check_prioritised_gene(cs_bp, chr_genes))) { susie_pg <- TRUE; break }
      }
    }

    # FINEMAP — read best cred file
    fm_pg  <- FALSE
    fmdir  <- file.path(ld$finemap_dir, lkey)
    creds  <- sort(list.files(fmdir, pattern = paste0("^", lkey, "\\.cred[0-9]+$"), full.names = TRUE))
    best_cred <- NULL; best_pr <- -1
    for (cf in creds) {
      hdr <- readLines(cf, n = 2)
      pr  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(regmatches(hdr[1], regexpr("[0-9.eE+\\-]+$", hdr[1]))))
      if (!is.na(pr) && pr > best_pr) { best_pr <- pr; best_cred <- cf }
    }
    if (!is.null(best_cred) && !is.null(chr_genes)) {
      clines <- readLines(best_cred)
      skip   <- grep("^index", clines) - 1
      if (length(skip) > 0) {
        cdat <- tryCatch(fread(best_cred, skip = skip[1]), error = function(e) NULL)
        if (!is.null(cdat)) {
          for (col in grep("^cred[0-9]+$", names(cdat), value = TRUE)) {
            fm_snps <- cdat[[col]][!is.na(cdat[[col]]) & cdat[[col]] != ""]
            if (length(fm_snps) == 0) next
            cs_bp <- ld$sumstats[SNP %in% fm_snps & CHR == chr_val_i, BP]
            if (!is.null(check_prioritised_gene(cs_bp, chr_genes))) { fm_pg <- TRUE; break }
          }
        }
      }
    }
    list(susie = susie_pg, fm = fm_pg)
  })

  # Build dropdown options (★★ = both methods; ★ = one method)
  opts <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(loci)), function(i) {
    lnum <- loci$loci_id[i]
    lkey <- sprintf("%03d", lnum)
    star <- if (pg_status[[i]]$susie && pg_status[[i]]$fm) " ★★"
            else if (pg_status[[i]]$susie || pg_status[[i]]$fm) " ★"
            else ""
    sprintf('<option value="%s">Locus %d (Chr%d: %s–%s)%s</option>',
            lkey, lnum, loci$chr[i],
            formatC(loci$start[i], format = "d", big.mark = ","),
            formatC(loci$end[i],   format = "d", big.mark = ","),
            star)
  }, character(1))

  cat('<div style="margin:10px 0 20px;">\n')
  cat('<label><strong>Select locus:</strong>&nbsp; (&#9733; = prioritised gene in one method &nbsp;|&nbsp; &#9733;&#9733; = both methods)&nbsp;</label>\n')
  cat(sprintf('<select style="font-size:14px;padding:4px 10px;" onchange="showLocus(\'%s\', this.value)">\n', aname))
  cat('<option value="">-- Choose locus --</option>\n')
  cat(paste(opts, collapse = "\n"), "\n")
  cat('</select>\n</div>\n')

  # Per-locus content divs
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(loci))) {
    locus_num <- loci$loci_id[i]
    locus     <- sprintf("%03d", locus_num)
    fit       <- ld$fits[[locus]]
    chr_val   <- loci$chr[i]
    has_cs    <- !is.null(fit) && !is.null(fit$sets$cs) && length(fit$sets$cs) > 0
    n_cs      <- if (has_cs) length(fit$sets$cs) else 0L

    cat(sprintf('\n<div id="%s-%s" class="locus-%s" style="display:none;border-top:2px solid #ccc;padding-top:16px;margin-top:8px;">\n',
                aname, locus, aname))

    cat(sprintf('<h4 style="margin-top:0">Locus %d &mdash; Chr%d: %s&ndash;%s</h4>\n',
                locus_num, chr_val,
                formatC(loci$start[i], format = "d", big.mark = ","),
                formatC(loci$end[i],   format = "d", big.mark = ",")))

    # SuSiE summary line
    if (!is.null(fit)) {
      sigma2  <- if (!is.null(fit$sigma2)) round(fit$sigma2, 4) else "—"
      lead    <- if (!is.null(fit$pip)) fit$snp_ids[which.max(fit$pip)] else "—"
      lead_p  <- if (!is.null(fit$pip)) round(max(fit$pip), 4) else "—"
      cat(sprintf(
        '<p style="font-size:13px;color:#555;"><strong>SuSiE:</strong> CS: %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; N CS: %d &nbsp;|&nbsp; σ²: %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; Lead SNP: <code>%s</code> (PIP = %s) &nbsp;|&nbsp; Converged: %s</p>\n',
        ifelse(has_cs, "Yes", "No"), n_cs, sigma2, lead, lead_p, fit$converged))
    } else {
      cat('<p><em>No SuSiE result available for this locus.</em></p>\n')
    }

    # ── Prioritised Gene alerts ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (has_cs) {
      chr_genes <- ld$gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]]
      for (cs_i in seq_len(n_cs)) {
        idx     <- fit$sets$cs[[cs_i]]
        cs_snps <- fit$snp_ids[idx]
        cs_bp   <- ld$sumstats[SNP %in% cs_snps & CHR == chr_val, BP]
        pg      <- check_prioritised_gene(cs_bp, chr_genes)
        if (!is.null(pg)) {
          cat(sprintf('<div style="background:#fff3cd;border-left:5px solid #ffc107;padding:8px 14px;margin:8px 0;border-radius:4px;"><strong>&#11088; Prioritised Gene (CS%d):</strong> <em>%s</em> &mdash; all credible set SNPs lie within this single gene.</div>\n', cs_i, pg))
        }
      }
    }

    # ── SuSiE section ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    cat('<h5 style="margin-top:18px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;padding-bottom:4px;">SuSiE L=5</h5>\n')
    if (is.null(fit)) {
      cat('<p><em>No result.</em></p>\n')
    } else if (!has_cs) {
      cat(sprintf('<p><em>No credible set. Top PIP SNP: <strong>%s</strong> (PIP = %.4f)</em></p>\n',
                  fit$snp_ids[which.max(fit$pip)], max(fit$pip)))
      p <- tryCatch(make_susie_plot(locus_num, ld), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(p)) cat(embed_gg(p, sprintf("%s_%s_susie.png", aname, locus)))
    } else {
      for (cs_i in seq_len(n_cs)) {
        idx     <- fit$sets$cs[[cs_i]]
        cs_snps <- fit$snp_ids[idx]
        cs_pips <- fit$pip[idx]
        cov     <- if (!is.null(fit$sets$coverage)) round(min(fit$sets$coverage, na.rm = TRUE), 4) else "—"
        cat(sprintf('<p><strong>CS%d:</strong> %d SNPs | Coverage: %s</p>\n', cs_i, length(cs_snps), cov))

        ss_cs <- ld$sumstats[match(cs_snps, ld$sumstats$SNP)]

        # Gene: use VEP SYMBOL if present, fall back to biomaRt positional overlap
        vep_g  <- ifelse(cs_snps %in% names(ld$vep_gene), ld$vep_gene[cs_snps], NA_character_)
        blank  <- is.na(vep_g) | vep_g == "-" | vep_g == ""
        if (any(blank)) {
          pos_g      <- gene_by_position(cs_snps[blank], chr_val, ld$sumstats,
                                         ld$gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]])
          vep_g[blank] <- pos_g
        }

        dt <- data.frame(
          SNP         = cs_snps,
          PIP         = round(cs_pips, 4),
          z           = round(log(ss_cs$OR) / ss_cs$SE, 3),
          OR          = round(ss_cs$OR, 3),
          SE          = round(ss_cs$SE, 4),
          P           = formatC(ss_cs$P, format = "e", digits = 2),
          Gene        = vep_g,
          Consequence = ifelse(cs_snps %in% names(ld$vep_consequence), ld$vep_consequence[cs_snps], NA_character_),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        dt <- dt[order(-dt$PIP), ]

        cat(sprintf('<details><summary><strong>CS%d SNPs &mdash; %d SNP%s (click to expand)</strong></summary>\n\n',
                    cs_i, nrow(dt), if (nrow(dt) == 1) "" else "s"))
        tbl <- knitr::kable(dt, format = "html", row.names = FALSE,
                            col.names = c("SNP", "PIP", "z", "OR", "SE", "P", "Gene", "Consequence")) %>%
          kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed", "hover"),
                                   full_width = FALSE, font_size = 12)
        cat(as.character(tbl))
        cat('\n</details>\n')
      }
      p <- tryCatch(make_susie_plot(locus_num, ld), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(p)) cat(embed_gg(p, sprintf("%s_%s_susie.png", aname, locus)))
    }

    # ── FINEMAP section ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    cat('<h5 style="margin-top:18px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;padding-bottom:4px;">FINEMAP k=5</h5>\n')
    fm_log <- file.path(ld$finemap_dir, locus, paste0(locus, ".log_sss"))
    if (!file.exists(fm_log)) {
      cat('<p><em>FINEMAP results not available for this locus.</em></p>\n')
    } else {
      ll       <- readLines(fm_log)
      exp_line <- grep("Post-expected", ll, value = TRUE)
      exp_k    <- if (length(exp_line) > 0)
        regmatches(exp_line[1], regexpr("[0-9.]+$", exp_line[1])) else "—"
      cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Post-expected # causal SNPs:</strong> %s</p>\n', exp_k))

      # ── FINEMAP prioritised gene alerts ────────────────────────────────────
      fmdir_pg   <- file.path(ld$finemap_dir, locus)
      creds_pg   <- sort(list.files(fmdir_pg, pattern = paste0("^", locus, "\\.cred[0-9]+$"), full.names = TRUE))
      best_pg    <- NULL; best_pr_pg <- -1
      for (cf in creds_pg) {
        hdr <- readLines(cf, n = 2)
        pr  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(regmatches(hdr[1], regexpr("[0-9.eE+\\-]+$", hdr[1]))))
        if (!is.na(pr) && pr > best_pr_pg) { best_pr_pg <- pr; best_pg <- cf }
      }
      if (!is.null(best_pg)) {
        clines_pg <- readLines(best_pg)
        skip_pg   <- grep("^index", clines_pg) - 1
        if (length(skip_pg) > 0) {
          cdat_pg  <- tryCatch(fread(best_pg, skip = skip_pg[1]), error = function(e) NULL)
          chr_genes_pg <- ld$gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]]
          if (!is.null(cdat_pg) && !is.null(chr_genes_pg)) {
            fm_cs_cols <- grep("^cred[0-9]+$", names(cdat_pg), value = TRUE)
            for (fcs_i in seq_along(fm_cs_cols)) {
              fm_pg_snps <- cdat_pg[[fm_cs_cols[fcs_i]]]
              fm_pg_snps <- fm_pg_snps[!is.na(fm_pg_snps) & fm_pg_snps != ""]
              if (length(fm_pg_snps) == 0) next
              fm_cs_bp <- ld$sumstats[SNP %in% fm_pg_snps & CHR == chr_val, BP]
              pg_fm    <- check_prioritised_gene(fm_cs_bp, chr_genes_pg)
              if (!is.null(pg_fm)) {
                cat(sprintf('<div style="background:#d4edda;border-left:5px solid #28a745;padding:8px 14px;margin:8px 0;border-radius:4px;"><strong>&#11088; Prioritised Gene — FINEMAP (CS%d):</strong> <em>%s</em> &mdash; all credible set SNPs lie within this single gene.</div>\n',
                            fcs_i, pg_fm))
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }

      # ── FINEMAP per-CS SNP tables ──────────────────────────────────────────
      fmdir    <- file.path(ld$finemap_dir, locus)
      snp_file <- file.path(fmdir, paste0(locus, ".snp"))
      cred_files <- sort(list.files(fmdir, pattern = paste0("^", locus, "\\.cred[0-9]+$"), full.names = TRUE))

      # Use best cred file (highest posterior Pr(k)) for CS membership
      best_cred <- NULL; best_pr <- -1
      for (cf in cred_files) {
        hdr <- readLines(cf, n = 2)
        pr  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(regmatches(hdr[1], regexpr("[0-9.eE+\\-]+$", hdr[1]))))
        if (!is.na(pr) && pr > best_pr) { best_pr <- pr; best_cred <- cf }
      }

      if (!is.null(best_cred) && file.exists(snp_file)) {
        fm_snps <- fread(snp_file)
        clines  <- readLines(best_cred)
        skip    <- grep("^index", clines) - 1
        if (length(skip) > 0) {
          cdat     <- tryCatch(fread(best_cred, skip = skip[1]), error = function(e) NULL)
          cs_cols  <- if (!is.null(cdat)) grep("^cred[0-9]+$", names(cdat), value = TRUE) else character(0)

          for (cs_i in seq_along(cs_cols)) {
            fm_cs_snps <- cdat[[cs_cols[cs_i]]]
            fm_cs_snps <- fm_cs_snps[!is.na(fm_cs_snps) & fm_cs_snps != ""]
            if (length(fm_cs_snps) == 0) next

            fm_pips  <- fm_snps$prob[match(fm_cs_snps, fm_snps$rsid)]
            ss_fm    <- ld$sumstats[match(fm_cs_snps, ld$sumstats$SNP)]

            # Gene: VEP then positional fallback
            vep_g  <- ifelse(fm_cs_snps %in% names(ld$vep_gene), ld$vep_gene[fm_cs_snps], NA_character_)
            blank  <- is.na(vep_g) | vep_g == "-" | vep_g == ""
            if (any(blank)) {
              pos_g        <- gene_by_position(fm_cs_snps[blank], chr_val, ld$sumstats,
                                               ld$gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]])
              vep_g[blank] <- pos_g
            }

            dt_fm <- data.frame(
              SNP         = fm_cs_snps,
              PIP         = round(fm_pips, 4),
              z           = round(log(ss_fm$OR) / ss_fm$SE, 3),
              OR          = round(ss_fm$OR, 3),
              SE          = round(ss_fm$SE, 4),
              P           = formatC(ss_fm$P, format = "e", digits = 2),
              Gene        = vep_g,
              Consequence = ifelse(fm_cs_snps %in% names(ld$vep_consequence),
                                   ld$vep_consequence[fm_cs_snps], NA_character_),
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
            dt_fm <- dt_fm[order(-dt_fm$PIP), ]

            cat(sprintf('<details><summary><strong>CS%d SNPs &mdash; %d SNP%s (click to expand)</strong></summary>\n\n',
                        cs_i, nrow(dt_fm), if (nrow(dt_fm) == 1) "" else "s"))
            tbl <- knitr::kable(dt_fm, format = "html", row.names = FALSE,
                                col.names = c("SNP", "PIP", "z", "OR", "SE", "P", "Gene", "Consequence")) %>%
              kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed", "hover"),
                                       full_width = FALSE, font_size = 12)
            cat(as.character(tbl))
            cat('\n</details>\n')
          }
        }
      }

      p_fm <- tryCatch(make_fm_plot(locus_num, ld), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(p_fm)) cat(embed_gg(p_fm, sprintf("%s_%s_finemap.png", aname, locus)))
    }

    # ── LD Heatmap section ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    cat('<h5 style="margin-top:18px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;padding-bottom:4px;">LD Heatmap</h5>\n')
    LD <- ld$ld_matrices[[locus]]
    if (!is.null(LD)) {
      n_snps <- nrow(LD)
      cat(sprintf('<p>%d &times; %d LD matrix (signed r; blue = negative, red = positive)</p>\n', n_snps, n_snps))
      cat(embed_base(ld_heatmap_fn(LD, locus_num), sprintf("%s_%s_ld.png", aname, locus)))
    } else {
      cat('<p><em>LD matrix not available for this locus.</em></p>\n')
    }

    cat('</div>\n')  # end locus div
  }
}
```

## Results {.tabset}

### SCZ vs BIP

```{r tab-sczvsbp, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_analysis("sczvsbp")
```

### SCZ vs BIP1

```{r tab-sczvsbp1, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_analysis("sczvsbp1")
```

### SCZ + BIP vs Controls

```{r tab-sczandbp, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_analysis("sczandbp")
```

---
<small>PGC4 fine-mapping — Cardiff University &nbsp;|&nbsp; SuSiE-RSS L=5 + FINEMAP-SSS k=5 &nbsp;|&nbsp; GRCh38</small>
